typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	varEndYear as integer (),
	varOTables as string (),
	varStartYear as integer (),
	var_batches as string (),
	var_batch_nbr as integer (),
	var_log_path as string (),
	var_fzg_fnln_row_score as decimal(10,0) (),
	var_fzl_fnln_row_score as decimal(10,0) (),
	var_fzl_fn_row_score as decimal(10,0) (),
	var_fzl_ln_row_score as decimal(10,0) (),
	Var_log_path as string ()
}

source(output(
		row_id as string,
		hosp_patient_nbr as string,
		phn as string,
		phn_clean as string,
		name_first_middle as string,
		name_last as string,
		name_first_middle_clean as string,
		name_last_clean as string,
		birth_date as date,
		gender as string,
		aka_name as string,
		street_addr1 as string,
		street_addr2 as string,
		city as string,
		province as string,
		postal_code as string,
		phone_number as string,
		data_source as string,
		row_score as integer,
		dupe_count as integer,
		match_code as string,
		master_row_id as string,
		master_phn as string,
		master_name_first_middle as string,
		master_name_last as string,
		master_birth_date as date,
		master_gender as string,
		master_street_addr1 as string,
		master_street_addr2 as string,
		master_city as string,
		master_province as string,
		master_postal_code as string,
		master_phone_number as string,
		master_data_source as string,
		destination as integer,
		name_first as string,
		julian_month as short,
		patient_nbr as integer,
		stage_id as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT         tpp.row_id,         hosp_patient_nbr,         phn,         phn_clean,         1 AS row_score,         name_first_middle,         name_last,         name_first_middle_clean,         name_first,         name_last_clean,         birth_date,         gender,         aka_name,         street_addr1,         street_addr2,         city,         province,         postal_code,         phone_number,         data_source,         COUNT(*) OVER(PARTITION BY phn_clean) AS dupe_count,         \'A\' AS match_code,         tpp.row_id AS master_row_id,         phn_clean AS master_phn,         name_first_middle AS master_name_first_middle,         name_last AS master_name_last,         birth_date AS master_birth_date,         gender AS master_gender,         street_addr1 AS master_street_addr1,         street_addr2 AS master_street_addr2,         city AS master_city,         province AS master_province,         postal_code AS master_postal_code,         phone_number AS master_phone_number,         data_source AS master_data_source,        CASE WHEN true_bb.row_id IS NOT NULL OR (sb.row_id IS NOT NULL AND tpp.phn_clean IS NULL AND (tpp.birth_date IS        NULL OR tpp.birth_date > \'2005-01-01\') ) THEN 1 ELSE 2 END AS destination,         julian_month,         patient_nbr,  /* ,CASE 	WHEN SUBSTRING([row_id], 4, 1)=\'P\' THEN CAST((SUBSTRING([row_id], 1, 3)) AS SMALLINT) 	ELSE 1000    END                                       AS julian_month   ,CAST((SUBSTRING([row_id], 5, 10)) AS INT) AS patient_nbr */        30001 AS stage_id FROM [ecms].[tmp_patient_prep] AS tpp LEFT JOIN      (      SELECT              row_id      FROM [ecms].[tmp_patient_name_first_middle_split]      WHERE (output_string IN (\'stillborn\', \'newborn\', \'baby\') /* 20200801: for these three we don\'t care for the position to handle spelling issues like NEW BORN, STILL BORN, and BAB Y. same doesn\'t apply for the list below	*/                OR (output_string IN (\'twin\', \'girl\', \'boy\', \'sb\') AND position <= 100) )       EXCEPT      SELECT              row_id      FROM [ecms].[tmp_patient_name_first_middle_split]      WHERE output_string NOT IN (\'stillborn\', \'newborn\', \'baby\', \'twin\', \'girl\', \'boy\', \'sb\', \'MALE\', \'FEMALE\', \'NEW\',      \'BORN\', \'STILL\', \'BAB\', \'ABY\') AND position <= 100 AND LEN(output_string) > 1      /*20200801: the last few after \'FEMALE\' is to cover the issue above, overtime we may have to adjust this */      ) AS true_bb      ON tpp.row_id = true_bb.row_id LEFT JOIN      (      SELECT              row_id      FROM [ecms].[tmp_patient_name_first_middle_split]      WHERE output_string = \'sb\' AND position = 1      EXCEPT      SELECT              row_id      FROM [ecms].[tmp_patient_name_first_middle_split]      WHERE (output_string IN (\'stillborn\', \'newborn\', \'baby\') ) OR (output_string IN (\'twin\', \'girl\', \'boy\') AND      position <= 100)      ) AS sb      ON tpp.row_id = sb.row_id WHERE phn_clean IS NOT NULL AND [mark] IS NULL;',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> srcptprep
srcptprep split(dupe_count > 1,destination == 1, disjoint: true) ~> ConditionalSplit@(duplicates,babies,ConditionalSplitDefaultOutput)
ConditionalSplit@duplicates sink(input(
		name_last_clean as string,
		name_first as string,
		gender as string,
		city as string,
		dupe_count as short,
		birth_date as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		julian_month as short,
		street_addr1 as string,
		street_addr2 as string,
		name_last as string,
		data_source as string,
		name_first_middle_clean as string,
		aka_name as string,
		province as string,
		hosp_patient_nbr as string,
		phn as string,
		phn_clean as string,
		phone_number as string,
		row_id as string,
		postal_code as string,
		name_first_middle as string,
		patient_nbr as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		name_last_clean,
		name_first,
		gender,
		city,
		dupe_count,
		birth_date,
		julian_month,
		street_addr1,
		street_addr2,
		name_last,
		data_source,
		name_first_middle_clean,
		aka_name,
		province,
		hosp_patient_nbr,
		phn,
		phn_clean,
		phone_number,
		row_id,
		postal_code,
		name_first_middle,
		patient_nbr)) ~> destpstg2
ConditionalSplit@babies sink(input(
		match_code as string,
		master_data_source as string,
		gender as string,
		city as string,
		dupe_count as short,
		birth_date as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		julian_month as short,
		street_addr1 as string,
		street_addr2 as string,
		name_last as string,
		aka_name as string,
		province as string,
		master_postal_code as string,
		master_birth_date as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		master_name_last as string,
		phn_clean as string,
		master_phone_number as string,
		patient_nbr as integer,
		name_first as string,
		master_phn as string,
		master_name_first_middle as string,
		master_province as string,
		master_gender as string,
		stage_id as integer,
		master_city as string,
		row_score as integer,
		data_source as string,
		master_row_id as string,
		hosp_patient_nbr as string,
		phn as string,
		master_street_addr2 as string,
		phone_number as string,
		master_street_addr1 as string,
		row_id as string,
		postal_code as string,
		name_first_middle as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		match_code,
		master_data_source,
		gender,
		city,
		dupe_count,
		birth_date,
		julian_month,
		street_addr1,
		street_addr2,
		name_last,
		aka_name,
		province,
		master_postal_code,
		master_birth_date,
		master_name_last,
		phn_clean,
		master_phone_number,
		patient_nbr,
		name_first,
		master_phn,
		master_name_first_middle,
		master_province,
		master_gender,
		stage_id,
		master_city,
		row_score,
		data_source,
		master_row_id,
		hosp_patient_nbr,
		phn,
		master_street_addr2,
		phone_number,
		master_street_addr1,
		row_id,
		postal_code,
		name_first_middle)) ~> patientmaster
ConditionalSplit@ConditionalSplitDefaultOutput sink(input(
		match_code as string,
		master_data_source as string,
		gender as string,
		city as string,
		dupe_count as short,
		birth_date as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		julian_month as short,
		street_addr1 as string,
		street_addr2 as string,
		name_last as string,
		name_first_middle_clean as string,
		aka_name as string,
		province as string,
		master_postal_code as string,
		master_birth_date as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		master_name_last as string,
		phn_clean as string,
		master_phone_number as string,
		patient_nbr as integer,
		name_last_clean as string,
		name_first as string,
		master_phn as string,
		master_name_first_middle as string,
		master_province as string,
		master_gender as string,
		stage_id as integer,
		master_city as string,
		row_score as integer,
		data_source as string,
		master_row_id as string,
		hosp_patient_nbr as string,
		phn as string,
		master_street_addr2 as string,
		phone_number as string,
		master_street_addr1 as string,
		row_id as string,
		postal_code as string,
		name_first_middle as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		match_code,
		master_data_source,
		gender,
		city,
		dupe_count,
		birth_date,
		julian_month,
		street_addr1,
		street_addr2,
		name_last,
		name_first_middle_clean,
		aka_name,
		province,
		master_postal_code,
		master_birth_date,
		master_name_last,
		phn_clean,
		master_phone_number,
		patient_nbr,
		name_last_clean,
		name_first,
		master_phn,
		master_name_first_middle,
		master_province,
		master_gender,
		stage_id,
		master_city,
		row_score,
		data_source,
		master_row_id,
		hosp_patient_nbr,
		phn,
		master_street_addr2,
		phone_number,
		master_street_addr1,
		row_id,
		postal_code,
		name_first_middle)) ~> masterstage1
